name: hexana
description: WebAssembly inspection tools for Codex backed by the Hexana MCP server.

interface.longDescription: Bundle the standalone Hexana MCP runtime with a Codex skill for WebAssembly inspection workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Hexana to summarize the imports, exports, and memories in this WebAssembly module.
Use Hexana to explain the structure of the selected .wasm file.
